app.title: Get the App
app.subtitle: Take Maritime with you everywhere
app.appDesc: Buy and sell stocks from your phone. Available on iOS and Android.
app.fullCustodyDesc: You hold your assets. No custodian, no counterparty risk.
app.instantExecutionDesc: Market orders filled immediately during trading hours.
app.secureDesc: Your wallet, your keys. We never hold your funds.

landing.badge: Web3 Robinhood for the Global South
landing.heroSub: Maritime turns idle stablecoins into a full financial life — trade, earn, spend, and send money home. Mobile-first, self-custody, and built for the two billion people traditional banks leave behind.
landing.problemBody1: In Argentina, a teacher paid in pesos loses 30% of her purchasing power every year — just by holding her own salary. She knows stablecoins exist. But no bank will serve her: no easy on-ramp, no yield, no way to send money home.
landing.problemBody2: She isn't alone — two billion people live this reality. And while $230 billion in stablecoins sits on-chain, most of it USDT across the Global South, it earns nothing. Because no one built the app for everyday people.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything your money needs, in one app.
landing.featuresSub: Maritime is vertically integrated — the assets, the services, and the wallet. Where others ship one piece, we deliver the whole financial life.
landing.f1Body: Buy, sell, and swap assets and tokenized commodities — a one-stop brokerage that lives in your pocket.
landing.f2Body: Put idle USDT to work. Maritime's liquidity pools turn dollars that just sat there into real yield.
landing.f3Body: Turn stablecoins into a Visa or Mastercard debit card, accepted at millions of merchants worldwide.
landing.f4Body: Move money along the routes it already travels — fast, low-cost remittances for you and your family.
landing.f5Body: Self-custody by default. Maritime executes trades as your proxy and never takes custody of your assets.
landing.f6Body: Minimal KYC, no paperwork, no branch visits — banking that feels as natural as breathing.
landing.howSub: No bank account required. All you need is a phone.
landing.s1Body: Get started in minutes with minimal KYC — no paperwork, no branch, no gatekeepers.
landing.s2Body: Keep your earnings in stablecoins instead of a local currency that loses value every year.
landing.s3Body: Grow your balance, spend it on a debit card, or send it home — all from one app.
landing.ctaSub: We're building the financial home for the global majority — retail-first, mobile-first, mission-first. Your wallet is your bank account.
landing.footerRights: © 2026 Atlas Labs, Inc. Built for the global majority. Trade responsibly — not available in all regions.
